title: Two round UFOs spotted hovering over Sobradinho I-DF [1999]
excerpt: MARCH 19th, 1999. Time: 16h15, Duration: 3 minutes. In Sobradinho I, Distrito Federal, two unidentified flying objects were observed by two people under good visibility conditions. According to the witnesses, the two round UFOs were red and silver, and were stationary during the whole sighting. They took no photographs and reported no traces of condensation […]
text_preview:
MARCH 19th, 1999. Time: 16h15, Duration: 3 minutes. In Sobradinho I, Distrito Federal, two unidentified flying objects were observed by two people under good visibility conditions. According to the witnesses, the two round UFOs were red and silver, and were stationary during the whole sighting. They took no photographs and reported no traces of condensation from the observed objects.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional (SIAN). Fundo ‘Objeto Voador Não Identificado (OVNI)’. Código de Referência BR DFANBSB ARX.0.0.544. “Questionário sobre a ocorrência de ob
summary: Two witnesses in Sobradinho I, DF observed two stationary red and silver round UFOs hovering for 3 minutes on March 19, 1999.
